reforms.description: The Ministry of International Trade and Industry (MITI) has decided to improve regulations concerning the distribution sector, aiming to enhance transparency and efficiency in the procedures for opening large retail stores.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing transparency and efficiency in retail regulations is expected to support the growth of startups and improve market conditions.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into effect as stated.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly impacts the retail sector but does not represent a structural change.
reforms.source_quote: The Ministry of International Trade and Industry (MITI), based on proposals by the Councils, has decided to improve the current regulations concerning the distribution sector.

reforms.description: The Japanese government has implemented major policy instruments to promote research and development, including direct research in national organizations and financing private sector research through the Fiscal Investment and Loan Program.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These policies are designed to enhance R&D capabilities in both public and private sectors, fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented as part of the government's strategy.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant overhaul of R&D funding mechanisms.
reforms.source_quote: Major policy instruments for research and development promotion are: Direct research in national organisations; Financing private sector research through the Fiscal Investment and Loan Program; Tax privileges for R&D expenditure, and subsidies to basic research such as development of new energy technologies.
